# Chase Sapphire Preferred

## 💳 Credits Overview

- 1 known recurring credit
- Value comes primarily from the hotel credit offsetting part of the annual fee

## 🏷️ Credit Details

1. $50 annual hotel credit — book through Chase Travel, no enrollment required, confirmed

## 📏 Usage Rules

- Resets each account anniversary year, confirmed
- Must book through Chase Travel portal to trigger

## 📋 Confidence Notes

- Fixture only. Not live card data.
